matchDetail: Expo source is at 8ab04e2. Render live backend and /version report 0b37191f. They do not match because the GitHub token used to sync commits to the GitHub repo connected to Render is expired (HTTP 401). New commits exist only on the Rork git router.

expoApp.detail: Expo app at expo/ is the only approved app. Android package com.ivxholdings.app, version 1.4.3, versionCode 13, 240 routes.

tests.detail: Core unit/integration tests: 378 pass, 0 fail, 0 error. Full test run including e2e: 428 pass, 1 fail (Playwright missing @playwright/test), 1 error (Playwright missing @playwright/test).

lint.detail: bunx expo lint passes with 0 errors and 578 warnings.

render.detail: Render deploy dep-d9bed5j7uimc73a9t8g is live, commit 0b37191f, 77 routes registered.

production.detail: api.ivxholding.com /version and /health return commit 0b37191f, status healthy.

easBuild.detail: EAS CLI requires an Expo user account. EXPO_TOKEN is not set in the sandbox. eas build --platform android --profile preview --non-interactive fails with: 'An Expo user account is required to proceed.'

github.detail: GitHub token expired (HTTP 401). GitHub repo ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest has commit 0b37191f. New commits pushed to Rork git router but not synced to GitHub due to expired token.

fullTestsIncludingE2e.notes: The single failure and error are both from the Playwright e2e spec __tests__/e2e/ivx-owner-ai-smoke.spec.ts because @playwright/test is not installed.

blockers: EXPO_TOKEN / Expo account is not available in the sandbox. EAS cloud build cannot run.
EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID is not set in the current environment.
GitHub token is expired, so the GitHub repo connected to Render cannot receive the new commits. Render remains at 0b37191f while local Expo source is at 8ab04e2.
APK cannot be produced or delivered until EAS credentials are provided.
fixesApplied: Updated plan to Expo-only approach; froze Kotlin app.
Fixed TypeScript errors: replaced AsyncStorage.multiRemove with AsyncStorage.removeMany (v3 API).
Fixed Expo lint script to use bunx expo lint.
Updated expo/package.json version to 1.4.3 to match expo/app.config.ts.
Updated expo/app.config.ts: versionCode 13, buildMarker build 13, sourceCommitSha 8ab04e2.
Fixed backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-runtime.ts so inspection-only tasks do not report endToEndProductionComplete=true when no deploy occurred.
Added Linking mock to chat-transport-reliability, offline-queue, and room-state-manager tests so they load in the Bun test environment.
Cleared generated audit logs from the repo working tree.
nextSteps: Provide EXPO_TOKEN and EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID so EAS can build the APK.
Update the expired GitHub token on Render to enable auto-deploy and SHA alignment.
Run eas build --platform android --profile preview to generate ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build13.apk.
Upload the resulting APK to a public HTTPS URL and deliver the link.
Run real-device Expo Go QA on the built APK.
